title: Expand Filter Functionality with Conditional Filters
excerpt: Need to expand filter functionality to support conditional filters such as “Show items in group 1,2, that contain tag a; and items from group 3 that do not contain tag a.” I can currently filter for the first half, or th…

posts.author: jharness (Josh Harness)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to expand filter functionality to support conditional filters such as “Show items in group 1,2, that contain tag a; and items from group 3 that do not contain tag a.” I can currently filter for the first half, or the second half, but not for both at once in the widget I am in.
